purpose: Audit and classify Scavenger's Guide to Droids feat parity without broad droid-system automation creep.

sourceBasis.uploadedPdf: SW Saga - Scavenger's Guide to Droids (optimized).pdf
notes: The uploaded PDF contents identify the droid hero chapter, feat section, droid equipment chapter, and droid codex as distinct rule domains.
This phase is feat parity and readiness only. Droid chassis, equipment, pricing, and codex actorization should be separate subsystems/phases.

expectedFeats.name: Aiming Accuracy
expectedFeats.notes: Requires aim/full-round action context, target persistence, and next-attack timing.

expectedFeats.name: Damage Conversion
expectedFeats.notes: Should be GM/player confirmed when qualifying non-area, non-ion, non-Force damage would move the droid down the condition track.

expectedFeats.name: Distracting Droid
expectedFeats.notes: Area enemy selection and can-see/can-hear adjudication should remain GM-confirmed.

expectedFeats.name: Droid Focus
expectedFeats.notes: Repeatable by different droid degree. Bonuses require target/source droid-degree context.

expectedFeats.name: Droid Shield Mastery
expectedFeats.notes: Should attach to a future personal/droid shield recharge action, not static defenses.

expectedFeats.name: Erratic Target
expectedFeats.notes: Movement reduction and dodge bonus are turn/position context, not passive Reflex math.

expectedFeats.name: Ion Shielding
expectedFeats.notes: Only relevant when ion damage exceeds DT and would worsen condition.

expectedFeats.name: Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap
expectedFeats.notes: Should remain chargen/progression choice metadata, not a generic roll bonus.

expectedFeats.name: Mechanical Martial Arts
expectedFeats.notes: Requires hit confirmation and one-round target penalty tracking.

expectedFeats.name: Multi-Targeting
expectedFeats.notes: Needs aim-state persistence across rounds/targets before automation.

expectedFeats.name: Pincer
expectedFeats.notes: Depends on Pin/Crush feat ownership and a grapple workflow.

expectedFeats.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
expectedFeats.notes: Rider should trigger from a qualifying Aiming Accuracy hit.

expectedFeats.name: Sensor Link
expectedFeats.notes: Awareness sharing and Aid Another availability are table-contextual.

expectedFeats.name: Shield Surge
expectedFeats.notes: Must not be implemented as actor static mitigation. Requires vehicle shield state.

expectedFeats.name: Slammer
expectedFeats.notes: Special attack with appendage and threshold rider; not a passive unarmed damage bonus.

expectedFeats.name: Tool Frenzy
expectedFeats.notes: Needs temporary Reflex penalty and appendage damage source selection.

expectedFeats.name: Turn and Burn
expectedFeats.notes: Withdraw replacement and Force Point reaction require movement/combat timing adjudication.

droidRulesNotInThisPhase.reason: This is chargen/species-chassis work and should be handled in the character creation/data model track.
Manufacturer traits are chassis/model traits and should be modeled as droid-origin traits, not feats.
Needs equipment catalogs, installation state, and store categorization work.
Needs a separate actorization/equipment companion architecture and should not be hidden inside feat parity.
These are NPC/stock model data imports and token/actor creation work, not feat automation.

recommendedNextWork: Add action-card candidates for Aiming Accuracy, Distracting Droid, Slammer, and Tool Frenzy after confirming the current action-card architecture.
Add damage-workflow hooks for Damage Conversion and Ion Shielding only after condition-track prompts can be GM-confirmed.
Add shield workflow support before automating Droid Shield Mastery or Shield Surge.
Audit droid chassis/species traits separately from feats.
